scroll_of_heal.name: scroll of healing
scroll_of_heal.lore: Inscribed in the flowing script of ancient temple healers, this scroll channels divine restorative energy into the reader's body. The words dissolve into warm golden light as they are spoken aloud, leaving the parchment blank and the reader mended.

scroll_of_mapping.name: scroll of mapping
scroll_of_mapping.lore: Cartographers of the old empire inscribed these scrolls with a sympathetic mapping enchantment. Upon reading, the dungeon's layout floods into the reader's mind as a complete spatial memory — every corridor, chamber, and stairwell within range suddenly known.

scroll_of_identify.name: scroll of identify
scroll_of_identify.lore: The text of this scroll, penned in ink derived from truth-speaking crystals, vibrates with revealing energy. When read aloud over an unknown object, the scroll's magic strips away all disguise and false appearance, revealing the item's true name and nature.

scroll_of_enchant_weapon.name: scroll of enchant weapon
scroll_of_enchant_weapon.lore: Written in fire-silver ink by weaponsmith-mages of the dwarven academies, this scroll bonds an additional layer of enchantment into any held weapon. The runes crawl up the blade as they're spoken, burning themselves permanently into the metal.

scroll_of_remove_curse.name: scroll of remove curse
scroll_of_remove_curse.lore: A liturgical text drawn from the Egyptian Book of Coming Forth by Day. When read aloud with proper pronunciation, the words sever any magical binding or malevolent enchantment attached to the reader's person or possessions, purifying them completely.

scroll_of_confuse_monsters.name: scroll of confusion
scroll_of_confuse_monsters.lore: This scroll was used by arena tamers to disorient multiple beasts simultaneously. The text is written in a spiraling pattern that, when read, projects a psychic dissonance affecting every creature in range — their senses scramble, their movements become erratic, and their intent is lost in confusion.

scroll_of_the_labyrinth.name: Scroll of the Labyrinth
scroll_of_the_labyrinth.lore: Sealed with the mark of the Cretan Labyrinth. A reward scroll from Dad -- show him this code!

scroll_of_the_gorgon.name: Scroll of the Gorgon
scroll_of_the_gorgon.lore: Sealed with a serpent's eye. A reward scroll from Dad -- show him this code!

scroll_of_the_hoard.name: Scroll of the Dragon Hoard
scroll_of_the_hoard.lore: Sealed with a golden dragon scale. A reward scroll from Dad -- show him this code!

scroll_of_ragnarok.name: Scroll of Ragnarok
scroll_of_ragnarok.lore: Sealed with the howl of the World-Wolf. A reward scroll from Dad -- show him this code!

scroll_of_the_abyss.name: Scroll of the Abyss
scroll_of_the_abyss.lore: Sealed with the mark of the Bottomless Pit. A reward scroll from Dad -- show him this code!

scroll_of_sleep.name: scroll of sleep
scroll_of_sleep.lore: Penned by the dream-weavers of Morpheus in ink distilled from poppy essence, this scroll releases a wave of irresistible somnolence. Every creature in sight is swept into deep slumber — only the reader, having spoken the words aloud, remains awake and free to act.

scroll_of_haste.name: scroll of haste
scroll_of_haste.lore: Written in quicksilver ink by fleet-footed Hermes himself — or so the seller claimed — this scroll binds the speed-essence of the divine messenger into the reader's limbs. For a short time, reality slows around you while you move at twice the natural pace.

scroll_of_enchant_armor.name: scroll of enchant armor
scroll_of_enchant_armor.lore: The armorers' guilds of three ages of the world spent centuries perfecting this scroll. Reading it aloud over a worn piece of armor causes the metal (or leather, or hide) to tighten, harden, and align — one permanent layer of reinforcement added to whatever protection you bear.

scroll_of_teleportation.name: scroll of teleportation
scroll_of_teleportation.lore: The spatial theorists of Alexandria considered this scroll a philosophical as much as a practical achievement. Reading it dissolves your relationship with the current point in space and reconstitutes you at some other floor tile, selected at the whim of the dungeon.

scroll_of_charging.name: scroll of charging
scroll_of_charging.lore: Inscribed by the artificers who first learned to trap raw magical force in crystalline matrices, this scroll rekindles exhausted power. Upon reading, ambient magical energy floods into every wand in the reader's possession, refreshing their reserves by one full charge each.

scroll_of_identify_all.name: scroll of mass identify
scroll_of_identify_all.lore: A far more powerful version of the common identification scroll. This text requires the reader to articulate the true name of knowledge itself. Upon completion, every obscured, unnamed, and unexamined item in one's possession is simultaneously revealed in full.

scroll_of_annihilation.name: scroll of annihilation
scroll_of_annihilation.lore: The most feared text in the dungeon archivist's catalogue. Its words were first spoken on the day the great library of Carthage burned. Reading it perfectly causes every creature in sight to dissolve in a flash of obliterating white energy, leaving only silence and ash.

scroll_of_time_stop.name: scroll of time stop
scroll_of_time_stop.lore: The theoretical framework for this scroll was laid by Zeno of Elea, who proved logically that motion is an illusion. Ten turns of absolute stillness surround the reader: monsters freeze mid-stride, arrows hang in mid-air, the dungeon holds its breath.

scroll_of_great_power.name: scroll of great power
scroll_of_great_power.lore: The capstone work of the philosopher Porphyry, who spent forty years distilling the essence of Aristotle's categories into a single transformative incantation. Those few who have read it perfectly emerge changed: stronger, hardier, swifter, keener, wiser, more perceptive. Every faculty permanently elevated by one degree.

scroll_of_enchantment.name: scroll of enchantment
scroll_of_enchantment.lore: Written by an anonymous enchanter of the Alexandrian school, this scroll channels raw magical force into whatever equipment the reader wears. The ink shimmers gold as the spell takes hold, permanently strengthening one piece of equipment.

scroll_of_thoth.name: Scroll of Thoth
scroll_of_thoth.unidentified_name: a papyrus scroll with hieratic script
scroll_of_thoth.lore: Thoth, ibis-headed god of knowledge, inscribed all wisdom into forty-two books. The priest Setna Khamwas stole this scroll from the tomb of Neferkaptah and was haunted by the dead for his theft. Those who read it understand all languages and see through all illusions — but knowledge stolen from the dead carries a price.

dead_sea_scroll.name: Dead Sea Scroll
dead_sea_scroll.unidentified_name: a brittle parchment sealed in a clay jar
dead_sea_scroll.lore: In 1947, a Bedouin shepherd threw a stone into a cave near Qumran and heard the sound of breaking pottery. Inside the jars were scrolls preserved for two thousand years. The War Scroll describes the final battle between the Sons of Light and the Sons of Darkness. Reading it reveals the battlefield — every corridor, every room, every enemy position.

scroll_of_arachne.name: Scroll of Arachne
scroll_of_arachne.lore: Sealed with a strand of unbreakable silk. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_lamia.name: Scroll of Lamia
scroll_of_lamia.lore: Sealed with a serpent's tear. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_talos.name: Scroll of Talos
scroll_of_talos.lore: Sealed with molten bronze. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_echidna.name: Scroll of Echidna
scroll_of_echidna.lore: Sealed with the mark of the Mother of Monsters. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_the_erlking.name: Scroll of the Erlking
scroll_of_the_erlking.lore: Sealed with a frozen leaf that never wilts. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_camazotz.name: Scroll of Camazotz
scroll_of_camazotz.lore: Sealed with a bat's wing pressed in wax. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_cacus.name: Scroll of Cacus
scroll_of_cacus.lore: Sealed with a scorch mark that still smolders. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_the_sphinx.name: Scroll of the Sphinx
scroll_of_the_sphinx.lore: Sealed with a riddle that answers itself. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_rangda.name: Scroll of Rangda
scroll_of_rangda.lore: Sealed with a lock of white hair. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_the_lion.name: Scroll of the Nemean Lion
scroll_of_the_lion.lore: Sealed with an impenetrable golden hair. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_baba_yaga.name: Scroll of Baba Yaga
scroll_of_baba_yaga.lore: Sealed with iron teeth marks. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_jormungandr.name: Scroll of Jörmungandr
scroll_of_jormungandr.lore: Sealed with a scale from the World Serpent. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_set.name: Scroll of Set
scroll_of_set.lore: Sealed with red sand from the desert of storms. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_the_green.name: Scroll of the Green Knight
scroll_of_the_green.lore: Sealed with a holly branch that bleeds sap. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_charybdis.name: Scroll of Charybdis
scroll_of_charybdis.lore: Sealed with salt water that never dries. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_ravana.name: Scroll of Ravana
scroll_of_ravana.lore: Sealed with the sigil of Lanka. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_the_wendigo.name: Scroll of the Wendigo
scroll_of_the_wendigo.lore: Sealed with frost that bites the fingers. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_the_hunt.name: Scroll of the Wild Hunt
scroll_of_the_hunt.lore: Sealed with a horn blast frozen in wax. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_anansi.name: Scroll of Anansi
scroll_of_anansi.lore: Sealed with a web that glints like gold. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!

scroll_of_nidhoggr.name: Scroll of Níðhöggr
scroll_of_nidhoggr.lore: Sealed with bark from the World Tree. A reward scroll from Dad — show him this code!
